name: Arcanea Forge — Visual Asset Registry
description: All generated visual assets with metadata for curation, publishing, and gallery integration

assets.title: Vessel of Living Intelligence
assets.notes: First gen — has labels/annotations, infographic style. Good concept, wrong execution.

assets.title: Arcanean Warship Omen
assets.notes: High quality render but still has labels. Cathedral tower, cyan conduits, asteroid field.

assets.title: Explorer — Collectible Model
assets.notes: Product-style 3D render on pedestal. Cathedral interiors visible. Has labels.

assets.title: Dreadnought Emerging from Nebula
assets.notes: No labels. Pure cinematic. Cathedral tower, crystalline hull, teal engines, ringed planet. Wallpaper quality.

assets.title: Interceptor — Canyon Chase
assets.notes: No labels. Matte black with cyan lines, alien desert canyon, golden hour, dust, crystal formations. Movie-still quality.

assets.title: Aethelred's Fury — Storm Galleon
assets.notes: No labels. Bioluminescent hull, sea serpent bowsprit, black sails, lightning storm, massive waves. Model added its own ship name.

assets.title: Ironclad Airship Fleet — Sunset Patrol
assets.notes: No labels. Steampunk fleet above cloud sea. Brass, rivets, glass bridge dome, escort formation, golden hour god rays, mountain peaks. Gorgeous.

statuses.published: Live on arcanea.ai (Gallery or page asset)
statuses.rejected: Not up to standard, keep for reference
statuses.variant: Alternative version of an approved asset
